description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Push that builds and compiles various versions of the ESP32 Marauder firmware for different boards and configurations. The workflow should trigger on a workflow dispatch and run on an ubuntu-latest environment. It should check out the repository, install dependencies, configure TFT_eSPI, and then build and rename the firmware binaries for Flipper Zero WiFi Dev Board, Flipper Zero Multi Board, OG Marauder, v6 Marauder, Marauder Kit, and Marauder Mini.
